AtomQuest — Hackathon Submission

Print this page (Ctrl+P) → Save as PDF to submit.

Problem statement

ATOMQUEST HACKATHON 1.0 — In-House Goal Setting & Tracking Portal

Organizations using spreadsheets and email for goals lack real-time alignment and audit-ready data. Build a web portal for the full goal lifecycle:

  • Phase 1: Goal sheets (max 8 goals, min 10% each, 100% weight), manager approve/rework/lock, shared KPIs.
  • Phase 2: Quarterly check-ins (planned vs actual), manager comments, BRD progress scores (Min/Max, Timeline, Zero-based).
  • BRD §2.3: Goal setting May–Jun; Q1 Jul; Q2 Oct; Q3 Jan; Q4/Annual Mar–Apr.
  • Roles: Employee, Manager (L1), Admin/HR.

Our solution

Full-stack portal: React + Express + PostgreSQL, hosted on Render.

RequirementOur solution
Goal validationEmployee UI + API: 8 goals, 10% min, 100% total
UoM & scoresMin/Max direction, BRD formulas in score calculator
Manager approvalTeam review — approve/rework, lock sheet
Shared KPIsPush to multiple employees; sync actuals from owner
Check-insQuarterly actuals, status, manager comments
BRD windowscycleWindows + Admin cycle schedule / demo mode
AdminAnalytics, CSV export, audit trail, unlock sheets
DeployReact + Express + PostgreSQL on Render (Docker)
